backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko canister actor with no logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to affected frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of key frontend files and their purposes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and variable definitions for the light theme using OKLCH colors.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/README.md: Project documentation explaining the Aviator demo, local development, and ICP deployment steps.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering the AviatorCrashDemo in dark mode.
frontend/src/components/AviatorCrashDemo: Main crash‑game component handling multiplier ticks, crash logic, cash‑out, and themed UI rendering.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Authentication context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login, logout, and stored identities.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind styles and OKLCH dark theme variables plus Orbitron/Inter font imports for the frontend.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app, wrapping it with React Query and an Internet Identity provider before rendering App.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, plugin extensions, custom colors, fonts, animations, and layout settings.
project_state.json: Stores the project’s metadata, feature definitions, requirements, and image needs for the Aviator demo.
